name: us500_ema_pullback_trend_m15_v1
hypothesis: On US500 M15, during an established uptrend (EMA50 > EMA200 AND ADX>20), pullbacks to EMA20 that close with bullish rejection resume the trend with >1.5R expectancy. Mirror for shorts. Trend regime filter prevents counter-trend whipsaw.

entry.long: ema50 > ema200 AND low <= ema20 AND close > ema20 AND close > open
entry.short: ema50 < ema200 AND high >= ema20 AND close < ema20 AND close < open

exit.stop_loss: 1.2 * ATR(14) below swing low (long) / above swing high (short)

notes: Verify US500 alias (SPX500/SP500). No session filter used — full 24h to maximize trade count toward 200 min.
